query_normalized: quantifying the influence of initial conditions on chaotic systems physics
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by providing empirical evidence and theoretical frameworks (Lyapunov exponents, stochasticity thresholds) for how energy levels (a form of initial condition) determine the transition between regular and chaotic regimes in the canonical Fermi-Pasta-Ulam (FPU) model, satisfying criteria (a) and (d).
